package rulecoverage

func PositiveSyncPoolIgnoredForFrequentSmallAllocs() string {
    ruleID := "sync_pool_ignored_for_frequent_small_allocs"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "repeated `make([]byte, size)` or `new(T)` in hot paths where the object is short-lived and could be pooled"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
